---
applyTo: "{docs/**,docs-site/**,README.md,STANDARDS.md,CONSTITUTION.md,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,GEMINI.md}"
---

Keep current state, target state, and future ideas labeled separately. Public or audience-specific documentation belongs
in `docs-site/docs/`; contributor and agent process documentation belongs in `docs/`. If implementation changed, make the
documentation impact explicit.
